name: Massena Savings And Loan
description_short: Community-focused savings and loan association serving Massena, NY and surrounding areas for over 100 years with FDIC-insured deposit accounts and online banking services.
description_long:
Massena Savings & Loan Association is a longstanding financial institution that has served the Massena and surrounding communities in upstate New York for more than a century. The organization operates as a traditional savings and loan association, positioning itself as a community bank with deep local roots and commitment to customer service.

The institution offers core banking services including online banking access, checking and savings accounts, debit cards, and text alert fraud monitoring. Customers can manage accounts remotely through their online banking platform and receive real-time notifications of suspicious debit card transactions. The company provides multiple channels for customer support, including branch visits during business hours and 24/7 phone support for after-hours online banking inquiries.

Massena Savings & Loan distinguishes itself through its emphasis on community involvement and cybersecurity education. The institution actively maintains social media presence, shares articles on phishing prevention and debit card security best practices, and promotes financial literacy among customers. All deposits are FDIC-insured, backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit security.

The company operates two physical branches with consistent hours (8:30 AM - 5 PM, Monday-Friday) and maintains dedicated customer service lines for routine inquiries, lost/stolen card reporting, fraud reporting, and debit card activation. However, the website does not display specific product details like interest rates, account minimums, loan offerings, or fee structures, limiting transparency for prospective customers researching the institution.
services: Online banking account access and login
Bill payment through online banking platform
Debit card text alert notifications for fraud detection
Lost or stolen debit card reporting service
Debit card fraud reporting and investigation
In-person banking at Massena branch location
In-person banking at Waddington branch location
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Over 100 years of community banking history in Massena area
24/7 after-hours online banking support via dedicated phone line (866-987-8311)
Debit card text alerts for fraud detection on suspicious transactions
Dedicated fraud reporting phone line (833-735-1891) for quick card issue resolution
Active community engagement through Facebook with regular updates and news
Cybersecurity education resources including phishing scheme warnings and password safety tips
Two physical branch locations with consistent business hours for in-person service
cons: Limited product information on website—no interest rates, fees, account minimums, or loan details disclosed
Only two branch locations (Massena and Waddington), restricting accessibility for customers outside immediate service area
No information about loan products, credit lines, mortgages, or investment services offered
Website does not specify online banking features, mobile app availability, or digital account opening capabilities
No mention of products like CDs, money market accounts, or other savings vehicles
best_for: Existing residents of Massena, NY and surrounding communities seeking local banking relationships
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured savings accounts with community institution backing
Individuals wanting debit card fraud protection and real-time transaction monitoring
Small savers and depositors with modest account maintenance needs and standard banking services
diagnosis: Massena Savings & Loan is best suited for established community members in the Massena, NY region who value local banking relationships and want FDIC-insured deposit accounts with fraud protection. The main caveat is that the institution's website provides minimal transparency about rates, fees, loan products, or account specifics—prospective customers must contact branches directly for detailed product information and comparison shopping.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
